arts.ttl: £50 million Premier League ace open to Newcastle move on one condition
arts.sum: Bournemouth defender Dean Huijsen has been linked with a move away from the club in the summer. According to a report from INews, Newcastle United are keen on signing the 19-year-old central defender and the player has a £50 million release clause in his contract. The defender is reportedly open to joining Newcastle but competing […] The post £50 million Premier League ace open to Newcastle move on one condition appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Leeds plotting summer move for 30-G/A Newcastle and Crystal Palace target
arts.sum: Leeds United are keen on securing the services of the Celtic attacker Nicolas Kuhn. They will face competition from Premier League clubs Crystal Palace and Everton as well. The former Germany youth international has been outstanding for the Scottish club and the likes of Newcastle and Brentford are keeping tabs on him as well as […] The post Leeds plotting summer move for 30-G/A Newcastle and Crystal Palace target appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle closing in on former Premier League ace, ready to pay €8 million
arts.sum: Newcastle United are looking to improve their defensive unit with the signing of Kalidou Koulibaly. The Senegalese international plays for Saudi Arabian club Al Hilal and a report from TV Play claims that Newcastle are closing in on him. They are prepared to offer €8 million in order to get the deal done. Koulibaly has […] The post Newcastle closing in on former Premier League ace, ready to pay €8 million appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United eyeing move for 24-year-old striker who won the league last season
arts.sum: Newcastle United have plans to strengthen their squad in the summer transfer window after not spending enough money in the last two windows. The Magpies were in trouble financially and focused more on getting financial stability in the last two windows. Eddie Howe and his team have still done well this season but to move […] The post Newcastle United eyeing move for 24-year-old striker who won the league last season appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'No way': What Joe Worrall couldn't believe about Murillo when he first joined Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Forest fans will agree with this...

arts.ttl: The scary '46% truth' of Newcastle United's squad that underlines Eddie Howe's coaching acumen
arts.sum: More incredibly out of the 24-man squad of players Howe scraped together to register for the second half of the Premier League season 11 of them were already on the books at St James' Park. Howe likes Lascelles and the centre-back had a good season last term as he played in the Champions League before suffering a knee injury.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer's 'blazing' Newcastle United message that Nottingham Forest will love
arts.sum: Magpies legend Alan Shearer wants to see a strong response from Eddie Howe's side after what was an unusually timid performance against Manchester City seven days ago, and that means attacking Forest in front of an expectant home crowd. Newcastle United have to go on the front foot and get at Nottingham Forest when the two sides meet at St James' Park this weekend .

arts.ttl: Newcastle United to meet with PIF hierarchy ahead of significant St James' Park decision
arts.sum: Club stadium supremo Brad Miller told fans of "two options" in the pipeline as the Magpies look to make a "once in a generation" decision. The second option we are looking at it seriously as it does have the potential to earn more than twice as much in terms of revenue, compared to a transformation of St James' Park.

arts.ttl: 'I don't have the words' - Cole Palmer has already delivered verdict on Newcastle transfer target - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: Cole Palmer has good reason to be a huge fan of Newcastle United transfer target James Trafford. Palmer's famous reaction was caught on camera, with the star telling team-mate Emile Smith-Rowe that Trafford would save the penalty.

arts.ttl: Newcastle Want to Sign 'Box Office' Forward Alongside Mbeumo for Howe
arts.sum: Newcastle United want to sign Monaco sensation Maghnes Akliouche this summer to bolster their attack.
